title: Ionic Ring Ship
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Imperial superweapon|the [[Ion Ring|Imperial project]]}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Ion_Ring_Ship.jpg]] |name=''Ionic Ring'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Renn Volz]]"[[The Second Kessel Run]]" |line= |model= |type=[[Capital ship/Legends|Capital ship]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem=Equipped |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Ion unit]]s |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=*Weather-control [[Starship/Legends|craft]] *[[Superweapon/Legends|Superweapon]] |commission=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |destroyed=0 ABY, above [[Little Kessel]] |retired= |battles=*[[Devastation of Rion]] *[[Devastation of Little Kessel]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Renn Volz]] |captains=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bzorn]] |crewmembers=[[Mira Volz]] |registry= |aliases=*''Climatizer'' *''Ion Ring'' *''Ion Ring Ship'' *''Ionic Ring Climatizer'' *''Ionic Ring Ship'' *''Volz Ion Ring'' }} {{Quote|Your father's ship sounds almost as deadly as the Empire's ''Death Star—!''|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Mira Volz]]|}} The '''''Ionic Ring''''' was a weather-control [[Starship/Legends|starship]] created by [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Renn Volz]] during his time at the [[Maw Installation]], and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. It was named after its '''Ion Ring''' or '''Climatizer''', the weapon built into it. ==Characteristics== {{Quote|My father invented the ''Ion Ring Ship'' to turn every planet into a ''paradise!''|[[Mira Volz]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} The ''Ionic Ring'' consisted of several ion units joined together in the shape of a ring. These ion units created a specific modulated ionic beam that could [[Weather control/Legends|manipulate]] a [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] weather patterns.''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' The ''Ionic Ring'' also housed a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|command bridge]] at its center and was capable of traveling through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ==History== {{Quote|With this ship, I'll have the Rebellion ''begging'' for mercy!''"
"''My invention was meant to ''stop'' suffering, not to ''create it—!''|Bzorn and Renn Volz|}} [[File:Ionic_Ring_reactor.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Ionic Ring'' fires its main reactor]] The ''Ionic Ring'' was created by [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Renn Volz]] during his tenure at the [[Maw Installation]]. Volz believed he was working for the good of the entire [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. He envisioned the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] as a climatizer, capable of altering the destructive forces of nature to [[Terraforming/Legends|terraform]] any wasteland into a paradise of a livable world. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] intended to use it as a weapon against planets harboring [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cells. After its first successful testing on the planet [[Zerm/Legends|Zerm]], the ''Ionic Ring'' was commandeered by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bzorn]], who had been tasked by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] to locate and punish Rebel planets. It was used to [[Devastation of Rion|devastate]] the planet [[Rion/Legends|Rion]], unleashing destructive storms. Afterward it was [[Devastation of Little Kessel|turned]] on Volz's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Little Kessel]]. Before the ''Ionic Ring'' could be used to fully destroy Little Kessel, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] rescued the professor who, devastated that his technology would be used for destruction by the Imperial military, took it upon himself to destroy the ship and the Ion Ring. He reversed the flow of the ship's ion units, causing a meltdown that destroyed the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. The four were barely able to escape with their lives aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Even though the ''Ionic Ring'' was destroyed, other Imperial [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] at [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] utilized Volz's theories to create a new weapon, the [[orbital nightcloak]].''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' ==Behind the scenes== This ship receives multiple names throughout ''[[The Second Kessel Run]]''. The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' establishes its official name as the ''Ionic Ring''. ==Appearances== *"[[The Second Kessel Run]]" {{Reprint|The Second Kessel Run}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|36|The Unseen Planets of Star Wars|The Unseen Planets of ''Star Wars''}} *{{CollectorCite|3|ComicScan|ComicScan: Coming Full Circle}} *''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|location|kessel|Kessel}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Ionic Ring Ship }} [[Category:Atmosphere and weather technology]] [[Category:Capital ships]] [[Category:Exotic technology]] [[Category:Ion weaponry]] [[Category:Starship superweapons]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
